rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SUSTAINED WITH AND WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. 1) PLAINTIFF TO REMOVE CLAIMS AGAINST LI & TRAN 2) SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND CAUSES OF ACTION 8,9,& 11 (RE; STATUTE OF LIMITATION) SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND CAUSES OF ACTION 5, RE; NO OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND CAUSES OF ACTION 12 NO PATTERN ROCKETEERING. 3) SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND CAUSES OF ACTIONS 2,3,4 6 & 7 TO PLEAD ILLEGALITY OF PREMIUMS AND DISCOVERY.(302/REQ/PB)
